changeSet.author: assistant
changeSet.sql: -- Ermittele document-Kategorie WITH doc_cat AS ( SELECT id FROM category WHERE entity_name = 'document' ), -- SubCategory: Wohnen & Eigentum sc_wu AS ( SELECT id FROM sub_category WHERE name = 'Wohnen & Eigentum' AND category_id = (SELECT id FROM doc_cat) UNION ALL SELECT id FROM ( INSERT INTO sub_category (id, name, translation_key, category_id) SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Wohnen & Eigentum', 'jaynaApp.document.main.housing-property', (SELECT id FROM doc_cat) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sub_category WHERE name = 'Wohnen & Eigentum' AND category_id = (SELECT id FROM doc_cat) ) RETURNING id ) ins ), -- SubCategory: Mobilität (für Fahrzeuge in Dokumenten-Kontext) sc_mob AS ( SELECT id FROM sub_category WHERE name = 'Mobilität' AND category_id = (SELECT id FROM doc_cat) UNION ALL SELECT id FROM ( INSERT INTO sub_category (id, name, translation_key, category_id) SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Mobilität', 'jaynaApp.document.main.mobility', (SELECT id FROM doc_cat) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sub_category WHERE name = 'Mobilität' AND category_id = (SELECT id FROM doc_cat) ) RETURNING id ) ins ), -- Gruppen unter Wohnen & Eigentum scg_miet AS ( SELECT id FROM sub_category_group WHERE name = 'Mietunterlagen' AND sub_category_id = (SELECT id FROM sc_wu) UNION ALL SELECT id FROM ( INSERT INTO sub_category_group (id, name, translation_key, sub_category_id) SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Mietunterlagen', 'jaynaApp.document.group.rental-docs', (SELECT id FROM sc_wu) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sub_category_group WHERE name = 'Mietunterlagen' AND sub_category_id = (SELECT id FROM sc_wu) ) RETURNING id ) ins ), scg_immo AS ( SELECT id FROM sub_category_group WHERE name = 'Immobilien' AND sub_category_id = (SELECT id FROM sc_wu) UNION ALL SELECT id FROM ( INSERT INTO sub_category_group (id, name, translation_key, sub_category_id) SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Immobilien', 'jaynaApp.document.group.real-estate', (SELECT id FROM sc_wu) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sub_category_group WHERE name = 'Immobilien' AND sub_category_id = (SELECT id FROM sc_wu) ) RETURNING id ) ins ), scg_manuals AS ( SELECT id FROM sub_category_group WHERE name = 'Anleitungen für Geräte' AND sub_category_id = (SELECT id FROM sc_wu) UNION ALL SELECT id FROM ( INSERT INTO sub_category_group (id, name, translation_key, sub_category_id) SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Anleitungen für Geräte', 'jaynaApp.document.group.device-manuals', (SELECT id FROM sc_wu) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sub_category_group WHERE name = 'Anleitungen für Geräte' AND sub_category_id = (SELECT id FROM sc_wu) ) RETURNING id ) ins ), -- Gruppe unter Mobilität scg_fzg AS ( SELECT id FROM sub_category_group WHERE name = 'Fahrzeuge' AND sub_category_id = (SELECT id FROM sc_mob) UNION ALL SELECT id FROM ( INSERT INTO sub_category_group (id, name, translation_key, sub_category_id) SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Fahrzeuge', 'jaynaApp.document.group.vehicles', (SELECT id FROM sc_mob) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sub_category_group WHERE name = 'Fahrzeuge' AND sub_category_id = (SELECT id FROM sc_mob) ) RETURNING id ) ins ) -- Typen (GroupTypes) INSERT INTO group_type (id, name, translation_key, sub_category_group_id) -- Mietunterlagen SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Mietvertrag', 'jaynaApp.document.type.rental-contract', (SELECT id FROM scg_miet) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM group_type WHERE name = 'Mietvertrag' AND sub_category_group_id = (SELECT id FROM scg_miet) ) UNION ALL SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Nebenkostenabrechnung', 'jaynaApp.document.type.utility-bill', (SELECT id FROM scg_miet) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM group_type WHERE name = 'Nebenkostenabrechnung' AND sub_category_group_id = (SELECT id FROM scg_miet) ) UNION ALL SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Übergabeprotokoll', 'jaynaApp.document.type.handover-report', (SELECT id FROM scg_miet) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM group_type WHERE name = 'Übergabeprotokoll' AND sub_category_group_id = (SELECT id FROM scg_miet) ) -- Immobilien UNION ALL SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Bauplan', 'jaynaApp.document.type.building-plan', (SELECT id FROM scg_immo) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM group_type WHERE name = 'Bauplan' AND sub_category_group_id = (SELECT id FROM scg_immo) ) UNION ALL SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Baugenehmigung', 'jaynaApp.document.type.building-permit', (SELECT id FROM scg_immo) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM group_type WHERE name = 'Baugenehmigung' AND sub_category_group_id = (SELECT id FROM scg_immo) ) UNION ALL SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Kaufvertrag (Haus)', 'jaynaApp.document.type.purchase-contract-house', (SELECT id FROM scg_immo) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM group_type WHERE name = 'Kaufvertrag (Haus)' AND sub_category_group_id = (SELECT id FROM scg_immo) ) -- Anleitungen für Geräte UNION ALL SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Bedienungsanleitung', 'jaynaApp.document.type.user-manual', (SELECT id FROM scg_manuals) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM group_type WHERE name = 'Bedienungsanleitung' AND sub_category_group_id = (SELECT id FROM scg_manuals) ) UNION ALL SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Installationsanleitung', 'jaynaApp.document.type.installation-manual', (SELECT id FROM scg_manuals) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM group_type WHERE name = 'Installationsanleitung' AND sub_category_group_id = (SELECT id FROM scg_manuals) ) UNION ALL SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Wartungshandbuch', 'jaynaApp.document.type.maintenance-manual', (SELECT id FROM scg_manuals) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM group_type WHERE name = 'Wartungshandbuch' AND sub_category_group_id = (SELECT id FROM scg_manuals) ) UNION ALL SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Garantiekarte', 'jaynaApp.document.type.warranty-card', (SELECT id FROM scg_manuals) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM group_type WHERE name = 'Garantiekarte' AND sub_category_group_id = (SELECT id FROM scg_manuals) ) -- Fahrzeuge (Mobilität) UNION ALL SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Fahrzeugbrief', 'jaynaApp.document.type.vehicle-title', (SELECT id FROM scg_fzg) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM group_type WHERE name = 'Fahrzeugbrief' AND sub_category_group_id = (SELECT id FROM scg_fzg) ) UNION ALL SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Fahrzeugschein', 'jaynaApp.document.type.vehicle-registration', (SELECT id FROM scg_fzg) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM group_type WHERE name = 'Fahrzeugschein' AND sub_category_group_id = (SELECT id FROM scg_fzg) ) UNION ALL SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'TÜV‑Bescheinigung', 'jaynaApp.document.type.tuv-certificate', (SELECT id FROM scg_fzg) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM group_type WHERE name = 'TÜV‑Bescheinigung' AND sub_category_group_id = (SELECT id FROM scg_fzg) ) UNION ALL SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Wartungsheft', 'jaynaApp.document.type.maintenance-record', (SELECT id FROM scg_fzg) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM group_type WHERE name = 'Wartungsheft' AND sub_category_group_id = (SELECT id FROM scg_fzg) ) UNION ALL SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Werkstattrechnung', 'jaynaApp.document.type.workshop-invoice', (SELECT id FROM scg_fzg) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM group_type WHERE name = 'Werkstattrechnung' AND sub_category_group_id = (SELECT id FROM scg_fzg) );
